chunks.text_preview: Queen of Housewives (; also known as My Wife Is a Superwoman ) is a 2009 South Korean romantic comedy television series , starring Kim Nam - joo , Oh Ji - ho , Yoon Sang - hyun , Lee Hye - young , Choi Cheol - ho , and Sunwoo Sun .
